message:
refactor(meta): condense meta-testing runner style and update coverage assertions

Simplify code style across meta-testing mutation and runner modules by
collapsing multi-line method chains, removing verbose doc comments, and
shortening variable names in tests for density.

- Collapse obligation_leak baseline/mutation method chains to single lines
- Remove doc comments from BuiltinMutation::name() and ::invariant()
- Condense MetaResult, MetaCoverageEntry, MetaCoverageReport, MetaReport,
  MetaRunner struct/method doc comments and formatting
- Shorten test variables (report1/report2 -> r1/r2, harness -> h)
- Flip meta_coverage_missing_invariants assertions: actor_leak, supervision,
  and mailbox are now covered by builtin mutations, no longer expected missing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
